watchman_signet.name: Watchman's Signet
watchman_signet.description: A tarnished ring bearing the old watch's tower sigil.

vigil_candle.name: Vigil Candle Stub
vigil_candle.description: A candle burned to a thumb's width, kept like a treasure.

charred_doll.name: Charred Doll
charred_doll.description: A child's doll, scorched down one side. Someone loved it.

princes_letter.name: Merchant Prince's Letter
princes_letter.description: A commission letter sealed in violet wax, never collected.

festival_ribbon.name: Faded Festival Ribbon
festival_ribbon.description: A ribbon from the great festival, colors gone soft with years.

goblin_warhorn.name: Cracked Goblin War-Horn
goblin_warhorn.description: Split down the middle — blown once too hard at the last raid.

cracked_riverstone.name: Cracked Riverstone
cracked_riverstone.description: A river-polished stone split by the sun of the dry year.

druid_charm.name: Druid's Woven Charm
druid_charm.description: Knotted reeds and green stone; it smells of deep forest.
